Tuning Notes: 10% bonus feels impactful without being mandatory. Test at level 5 with Fighter.
Front-liners need to FEEL exposed. 15% might be too harsh for glass cannons forced front.
10% penalty is mild. Backliners should still contribute damage meaningfully.
15% reduction is the reward for staying back. Combined with melee immunity it may be too safe.
3 turns is 1 round cycle. Permanent taunt removes player agency.
Should feel devastating if not interrupted. 2.5x base ATK. Test vs party at 70% HP.
Each subsequent target takes 70% of base. At 1.0 all targets take full damage.
1 turn to interrupt forces instant reaction. 2 turns is lenient.
20% of boss HP. At level 5 boss ~2000 HP = 400 HP minions. Should die in 2-3 hits.
40% of boss ATK. Annoying but not lethal individually.
+15% per dead minion. Both dead = +30%. Should be scary but survivable.
2 minions max. 3 overwhelms action economy.
Arbitrary scale. What matters is gain/loss ratio.
Fills in 5 rounds uncontested. Party has 5 turns to hit weakness.
One weakness hit buys 2 rounds. Party needs 1 weakness-capable member.
+50% ATK during empower. Should feel like a punishment for not exploiting weakness.
+20% DEF is secondary. Main threat is damage increase.
3 turns of danger. Short enough that surviving is possible with good healing.
8% max HP per turn. At 2000 HP = 160 dmg/turn. Meaningful but not lethal alone.
-20% Speed affects turn order. Too high and the party never acts first.
3 turns is enough to force a response without permanently dominating.
At 30% HP. Lower = less time in transformed state. Higher = longer fight.
Heals 20% of NEW max HP. Too much feels unfair. 0% makes transform fragile.
2.5 seconds total. Under 2s is stressful. Over 3s is trivial.
700ms per key. Skilled players can do 300ms. Casual needs 800ms+.
+30% is big enough to feel rewarding. Over +50% makes QTE mandatory.
+15% softens the binary. Partial success should feel OK not bad.
-10% is mild. Players should not be punished harshly for failing an optional mechanic.
50% of keys correct = partial. Lower threshold = more forgiving.
+15% per additional attacker. 3 wolves on same target = +30% for the 3rd.
+50% ATK for the last wolf. High enough to create urgency.
+30% Speed means it likely goes first next round.
+10% ATK aura. Noticeable across 3-4 allies. 20% would be oppressive.
+10% DEF aura. Makes killing minions slightly harder.
+40% bonus for combo follow-up. High reward for the AI but avoidable via position.
1 free item. 2 would make Rogue the best healer in the game via potions.
+40% from back position. Stacks with crit = burst window.
+15% crit chance from back. Combines with DEX crit scaling.
